scripts.build: pnpm run validate:content && cross-env ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check && cross-env ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build
scripts.build:production: node scripts/validate-release-environment.mjs && cross-env STRICT_CONTENT=1 pnpm run build
scripts.media:assets: pnpm run media:images && pnpm run media:manifest
scripts.deploy:r2: pnpm run deploy:r2:standard && pnpm run deploy:r2:low
scripts.deploy:r2:standard: npx --yes wrangler@4 r2 object put shuangshoujian/yu-chenghui-shuangshoujian.mp4 --file public/media/yu-chenghui-shuangshoujian.mp4 --content-type video/mp4 --remote
scripts.deploy:r2:low: npx --yes wrangler@4 r2 object put shuangshoujian/yu-chenghui-shuangshoujian-low.mp4 --file public/media/yu-chenghui-shuangshoujian-low.mp4 --content-type video/mp4 --remote
scripts.deploy:pages: pnpm run build:cloudflare && npx --yes wrangler@4 pages deploy dist --project-name shuangshoujian --branch main
